name: No-Bake Fudge Nuggets
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
2. Boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the peanut butter, vanilla, and oatmeal until well combined.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper.
5. Allow to cool completely before serving.
